zh_tw: # src/tools/background-task/ — 背景任務工具包裝器

original: 18 files. Tool-layer wrappers for `background_output` and `background_cancel`. Does NOT implement the background execution engine — that lives in `src/features/background-agent/`. This directory provides the LLM-facing tool interface.
zh_tw: 18 個檔案。`background_output` 和 `background_cancel` 的工具層包裝器。這裡不實作背景執行引擎，該引擎位於 `src/features/background-agent/`。此目錄提供面向 LLM 的工具介面。

original:
| Tool | Factory | Purpose |
|------|---------|---------|
| `background_output` | `createBackgroundOutput` | Get results from a running/completed background task |
| `background_cancel` | `createBackgroundCancel` | Cancel running task(s) |
| `createBackgroundTask` | internal | Shared factory used by both |
zh_tw:
| 工具 | 工廠 | 用途 |
|------|---------|---------|
| `background_output` | `createBackgroundOutput` | 取得執行中/已完成背景任務的結果 |
| `background_cancel` | `createBackgroundCancel` | 取消執行中的任務 |
| `createBackgroundTask` | internal | 兩者共用的工廠 |

original:
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `create-background-output.ts` | `background_output` tool: fetch task results by task_id |
| `create-background-cancel.ts` | `background_cancel` tool: cancel by taskId or all=true |
| `create-background-task.ts` | Shared tool factory with common params |
| `clients.ts` | Client interfaces for background output and cancel |
| `session-messages.ts` | Fetch session messages from OpenCode |
| `full-session-format.ts` | Format full session output (messages, thinking blocks) |
| `task-result-format.ts` | Format task result for LLM consumption |
| `task-status-format.ts` | Format task status (running/completed/error) |
| `message-dir.ts` | Temp directory for message exchange |
| `truncate-text.ts` | Truncate large output to fit context |
| `time-format.ts` | Human-readable duration formatting |
| `delay.ts` | Polling delay utility |
| `types.ts` | `BackgroundTaskOptions`, result/status types |
| `constants.ts` | Timeout defaults, polling intervals |
zh_tw:
| 檔案 | 用途 |
|------|---------|
| `create-background-output.ts` | `background_output` 工具：依 `task_id` 取得任務結果 |
| `create-background-cancel.ts` | `background_cancel` 工具：依 `taskId` 或 `all=true` 取消 |
| `create-background-task.ts` | 含有共用參數的共用工具工廠 |
| `clients.ts` | 背景輸出與取消的用戶端介面 |
| `session-messages.ts` | 從 OpenCode 擷取 session 訊息 |
| `full-session-format.ts` | 格式化完整的 session 輸出（訊息、thinking 區塊） |
| `task-result-format.ts` | 格式化供 LLM 消費的任務結果 |
| `task-status-format.ts` | 格式化任務狀態（running/completed/error） |
| `message-dir.ts` | 訊息交換用的暫存目錄 |
| `truncate-text.ts` | 截斷大型輸出以符合上下文 |
| `time-format.ts` | 人類可讀的持續時間格式化 |
| `delay.ts` | 輪詢延遲工具 |
| `types.ts` | `BackgroundTaskOptions`、結果/狀態型別 |
| `constants.ts` | 逾時預設值、輪詢間隔 |

original:
```
background_output(task_id, block=false)  → check current status/result
background_output(task_id, block=true)   → wait until complete (timeout default: 120s)
background_output(task_id, full_session=true) → return full session transcript
background_output(task_id, message_limit=N) → last N messages only
background_output(task_id, include_thinking=true) → include thinking blocks
```
zh_tw:
```
background_output(task_id, block=false)  → 檢查目前狀態/結果
background_output(task_id, block=true)   → 等待直到完成（預設逾時：120s）
background_output(task_id, full_session=true) → 回傳完整的 session 逐字稿
background_output(task_id, message_limit=N) → 僅回傳最後 N 則訊息
background_output(task_id, include_thinking=true) → 包含 thinking 區塊
```

original:
```
tools/background-task/  ← LLM tool interface
features/background-agent/  ← execution engine (BackgroundManager)
```
zh_tw:
```
tools/background-task/  ← LLM 工具介面
features/background-agent/  ← 執行引擎（BackgroundManager）
```

original: `createBackgroundOutput` queries `BackgroundManager.getTask(task_id)` — it does not manage task state.
zh_tw: `createBackgroundOutput` 會查詢 `BackgroundManager.getTask(task_id)` — 它不負責管理任務狀態。
